channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Thinking Machines releases Inkling multimodal reasoning model with open weights
item.description: The model processes text, images, and audio via the Tinker platform.
item.content:encoded:
The model processes text, images, and audio via the Tinker platform.

Original source: https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/hrt6ltes

  • Views: 2,247,483
  • Likes: 25,099
  • Bookmarks: 5,342
  • Quotes: 188
  • Replies: 848
  • Posts: 131

Top authors

  • Lilian Weng
  • John Schulman
  • Mira Murati
  • Soumith Chintala
  • Eric Jang

item.title: Thinking Machines Lab releases 975B parameter multimodal MoE model Inkling
item.description: The open-weights model supports a 1M token context window.
item.content:encoded:
The open-weights model supports a 1M token context window.

Original source: https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/h0mkje58

  • Views: 281,463
  • Likes: 3,179
  • Bookmarks: 607
  • Quotes: 31
  • Replies: 128
  • Posts: 45

  • Soumith Chintala
  • Nathan Lambert
  • rohan anil
  • clem 🤗

item.title: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis proposes third-party testing framework for frontier AI
item.description: Satya Nadella, Elon Musk, and Anthropic's Tom Brown endorsed the plan.
item.content:encoded:
Satya Nadella, Elon Musk, and Anthropic's Tom Brown endorsed the plan.

Original source: https://x.com/demishassabis

item.title: Bret Taylor stops using em dashes to avoid AI slop label
item.description: OpenAI CPO Kevin Weil echoed the frustration over altered writing styles.
item.content:encoded:
OpenAI CPO Kevin Weil echoed the frustration over altered writing styles.

Original source: https://x.com/btaylor

item.title: Elon Musk says X will open-source its entire codebase after security audit
item.description: Third-party reviewers will verify that production code matches the open-source release.
item.content:encoded:
Third-party reviewers will verify that production code matches the open-source release.

Original source: https://x.com/elonmusk

item.title: New York Governor signs first statewide data center moratorium
item.description: The one-year pause aims to establish AI infrastructure safeguards.
item.content:encoded:
The one-year pause aims to establish AI infrastructure safeguards.

Original source: https://www.nvtc.org/press-releases/new-nvtc-report-virginia-data-centers-drive-40-billion-in-statewide-economic-impact/

item.title: DeepMind scientist Alex Turner resigns over unrestricted military AI sales
item.description: Google dropped its internal AI weapons ban in 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Google dropped its internal AI weapons ban in 2025.

Original source: https://turntrout.com/why-i-left-google-deepmind

item.title: OpenAI and Work Louder launch $230 hardware deck for AI coding
item.description: The device features a tactile dial to adjust AI reasoning effort
item.content:encoded:
The device features a tactile dial to adjust AI reasoning effort

Original source: https://openai.com/supply/co-lab/work-louder/

item.title: xAI open-sources Grok Build coding agent harness and TUI
item.description: The release includes CLI tools to build a robust harness.
item.content:encoded:
The release includes CLI tools to build a robust harness.

item.title: xAI open-sources Grok Build code and resets usage limits
item.description: The release includes the platform's CLI tool and harness components.
item.content:encoded:
The release includes the platform's CLI tool and harness components.
